topics.title: Political Commentary and Celebrity Gossip
topics.summary: The show features a discussion on the 2008 presidential candidates, celebrity appearances, personal anecdotes regarding relationships, and an upcoming bare-knuckle fighting event.

topics.title: Radio Show Feedback and Upcoming Segments
topics.summary: The studio reviews listener feedback regarding recent guests, discusses upcoming promotional segments like the history of the show, and addresses various fan inquiries about the broadcast.

topics.title: Cookie Gate and Show Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses a controversy involving a dishonest cookie contest winner, critiques of various media personalities, and segments on local radio production.

topics.title: Dirty Computers and Chuck Zito Stories
topics.summary: The studio explores the hygiene of shared computer equipment, recounts Chuck Zito’s experiences with a woman in a nightgown and his arrest over a leather jacket, and interviews a male model who entered the gay porn industry.

topics.title: Adult Film Career and Personal Life
topics.summary: The studio explores the guest's experiences in the adult film industry, including his career progression, financial success, and personal history regarding his sexuality.

topics.title: Zeb Atlas Interview
topics.summary: The studio hosts an interview with adult film actor Zeb Atlas to discuss his career in the industry, his personal identity, and his experiences with various types of performances.

topics.title: Zeb Atlas and Lisa Lampanelli Interviews
topics.summary: The studio features discussions with Zeb Atlas regarding his fitness routine and an interaction with Richard, followed by Lisa Lampanelli sharing stories about her Grammy nomination and a sexual encounter with an NFL player.

topics.title: Grammy Nominations and Comedy Roast Memories
topics.summary: The studio discusses Lisa Lampanelli's Grammy nomination, the intricacies of comedy awards, and humorous anecdotes from past celebrity roasts involving Gene Simmons and Carrot Top.

topics.title: Interview with Danielle DeMarco
topics.summary: The studio introduces and interviews Danielle DeMarco, a hairstylist and model who will serve as the host's featured guest for the month.

topics.title: Miss Howard TV Selection and News Preview
topics.summary: The studio evaluates a new contestant for the Miss Howard TV title while previewing upcoming news segments including reports on local events, celebrity updates, and upcoming radio specials.

topics.title: Celebrity Endorsements and News Stories
topics.summary: The studio discusses celebrity endorsements for Barack Obama, Will Smith’s handprint ceremony, a London widow's inheritance, a doorman's suspension for bad breath, and the marriage of a reality TV star.

topics.title: Celebrity News and Current Events
topics.summary: The show covers various topics including the public images of Amy Winehouse and Britney Spears, rising pet ownership statistics, the sentencing of Michael Vick, Led Zeppelin's recent performance, and upcoming comedy tours.
